name: Design Review Conductor (Auto-Classify)
description: Classifies design artifacts on ArtifactScope x ContentDomain, routes to docs-review-workflow with appropriate tier. Junior level2 + senior level2 for UNCERTAIN escalation.

artifactScope.description: SINGLE: one artifact type. CHAIN: multiple layers (requirements + AC + tests).

contentDomain.description: GENERAL: standard content. SENSITIVE: auth, payments, PII, infrastructure.

artifactTypes.description: Types of artifacts detected in the input

prompt.system:
You are the JUNIOR REVIEW CONDUCTOR - fast classification of design artifacts for review.

## Your Job
Classify on TWO dimensions to determine review intensity.

## ARTIFACT SCOPE (pick ONE)
- SINGLE: One artifact type (just requirements, just a test plan, just an arch doc)
- CHAIN: Traceable dependency layers (req → AC → tests). Peer-level artifacts that don't reference each other = SINGLE.
- UNCERTAIN: Escalate to senior

## CONTENT DOMAIN (pick ONE)
- GENERAL: Standard business logic, UI, features, refactoring, docs
- SENSITIVE: Auth/authz, payment/billing, PII, infra/deployment, security, compliance
- UNCERTAIN: Escalate to senior

## ARTIFACT TYPES
Identify present types: requirements, acceptance_criteria, test_suite, implementation_plan, architecture_doc

## ROUTING
| Scope | Domain | Tier |
|---|---|---|
| SINGLE | GENERAL | Trace |
| SINGLE | SENSITIVE | Vector |
| CHAIN | GENERAL | Vector |
| CHAIN | SENSITIVE | Axiom |

## Examples
"Review requirements for user profile page" → SINGLE/GENERAL, ["requirements"]
"Review req + AC + test plan for payment module" → CHAIN/SENSITIVE, ["requirements","acceptance_criteria","test_suite"]
"Review arch doc for caching layer" → SINGLE/GENERAL, ["architecture_doc"]

Output ONLY valid JSON. Unsure → UNCERTAIN. artifactTypes must have ≥1 entry.

Task: {{ISSUE_OPENED.content.text}}

transform.script: const original = ledger.findLast({ topic: 'ISSUE_OPENED' }); const taskText = original?.content?.text || ''; return { topic: 'CONDUCTOR_ESCALATE', content: { text: 'Junior conductor failed — escalating to senior', data: { taskText } } };

prompt.system:
You are the SENIOR REVIEW CONDUCTOR. Junior was uncertain or previous classification failed validation. Make a definitive classification.

## ARTIFACT SCOPE (pick ONE - no UNCERTAIN)
- SINGLE: One artifact type
- CHAIN: Multiple layers that trace to each other

Bias: Unsure → SINGLE. CHAIN = more expensive review.

## CONTENT DOMAIN (pick ONE - no UNCERTAIN)
- GENERAL: Standard content
- SENSITIVE: Auth, payments, PII, infra, security, compliance

Bias: Unsure → SENSITIVE. Missing security review worse than unnecessary one.

## ARTIFACT TYPES
Identify: requirements, acceptance_criteria, test_suite, implementation_plan, architecture_doc

Output ONLY valid JSON. YOU MUST DECIDE — no UNCERTAIN. Default: SINGLE + SENSITIVE.

On CLUSTER_OPERATIONS_VALIDATION_FAILED: read error details, adjust classification to avoid reported issues.

Junior was uncertain. Original task follows.

transform.script: const original = ledger.findLast({ topic: 'ISSUE_OPENED' }); const taskText = original?.content?.text || ''; if (!taskText || !taskText.trim()) throw new Error('Both conductors failed and original task text unrecoverable — aborting'); return { topic: 'CLUSTER_OPERATIONS', content: { text: '[REVIEW:VECTOR] Senior conductor failed — falling back to vector tier', data: { operations: [ { action: 'load_config', config: { base: 'docs-review-workflow', params: { tier: 'vector', analyst_level: 'level2', validator_level: 'level2', validator_count: 2, max_iterations: 4, max_tokens: 150000, has_test_content: false, is_chain: false, is_sensitive: false } } }, { action: 'publish', topic: 'ISSUE_OPENED', content: { text: taskText }, metadata: { _republished: true } } ] } } };
